headlines.title: Japan's Cabinet Approves Scrapping Ban on Lethal Weapons Exports
headlines.summary: Japan's Cabinet approves guidelines ending postwar ban on lethal weapons exports amid threats from China and North Korea, boosting arms industry and defense spending. Global arms trade affected; enables sales of fighter jets and drones. Marks major shift in pacifist policy.

framings.angle: Details Cabinet approval of new guideline as change in pacifist policy over regional aggression
Emphasizes end to decades-old ban expanding advanced defense equipment exports
Highlights clearance of hurdles for sales of next-generation fighter jets and drones

headlines.title: Federal Judge Sentences Purdue Pharma to Forfeit $225 Million in Opioids Case
headlines.summary: Judge sentences OxyContin maker Purdue Pharma to forfeit $225 million to Justice Department, resolving federal charges and enabling settlements in thousands of opioid lawsuits. Victims and states receive funds; provides accountability in crisis killing hundreds of thousands.

headlines.title: Gunman Kills One Canadian, Wounds 13 Tourists at Teotihuacan Pyramids
headlines.summary: Gunman atop historic Teotihuacan pyramid in Mexico shoots tourists, killing one Canadian and injuring at least 13 others. Visitors and tourism industry affected; authorities probe motive. Heightens security concerns for major archaeological site drawing millions yearly.

headlines.title: Tank Explosion Kills Three Ground Self-Defense Force Members in Training
headlines.summary: Three Japan Ground Self-Defense Force members die in tank explosion during training at Hijudai maneuver area in Oita Prefecture. Military personnel affected; investigation underway. Underscores risks in Japan's expanding defense exercises amid policy shifts.

headlines.title: Ukraine Deploys Armed Robots to Offset Shortages of Ground Troops
headlines.summary: Ukraine uses bomb- and gun-armed unmanned ground vehicles for attacks to protect soldiers amid troop shortages. Frontline troops spared risks; Russia targeted. Advances robotic warfare, potentially altering battlefield dynamics in prolonged conflict.

headlines.title: China Nuclear Association Reports Capacity to Build 50 Reactors Simultaneously
headlines.summary: China announces ability to construct up to 50 nuclear reactors at once across full project cycles, per nuclear association report. Energy sector and global nuclear market affected; accelerates clean power expansion. Positions China as leader in nuclear technology exports.

headlines.title: China Developer Vanke Reports Huge Losses in Property Crisis Spread
headlines.summary: Leading developer Vanke discloses massive losses, indicating widening real estate woes across China. Homebuyers, investors and economy hit; state intervention eyed. Threatens financial stability in sector vital to GDP growth.

headlines.title: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Overrun Troops and Enter Goma City After Shelling
headlines.summary: Rwanda-backed rebels overrun Congolese troops with gunfire and shelling, entering Goma safe-haven city where over one million displaced residents shelter. Civilians and aid operations affected; evacuation efforts intensify. Escalates eastern Congo conflict.
headlines.previousContext: Rebels overran troops amid gunfire and shelling; more than one million displaced people now shelter inside Goma city

headlines.title: Displaced Palestinians Cross Military Zone Back into Northern Gaza
headlines.summary: Israel allows displaced Palestinians to stream on foot into northern Gaza after breaking hostage deal deadlock. Hundreds of thousands affected; reconstruction challenges ahead. Eases humanitarian strain but conflict persists.
headlines.previousContext: Residents begin crossing military zone bisecting enclave following hostage releases; returns proceed on foot
